title: crotalaria madurensis var. madurensis
intro: Crotalaria madurensis var. madurensis, a variety of the Crotalaria madurensis plant, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine to treat a variety of ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Crotalaria madurensis var. madurensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory problems, and boost the immune system. Crotalaria madurensis var. madurensis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers are also used in traditional medicine preparations, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
